entity.summary: South Korean centralized cryptocurrency exchange providing KRW trading pairs, order-book markets, authenticated order placement and cancellation, account balances, deposits and withdrawals, market data, and REST and WebSocket APIs.
entity.notes: Current first-party exchange site is reachable. Official GOPAX API documentation covers balances, orders, trades, deposits and withdrawals, trading pairs, order books, tickers, market statistics, charts, notices, WebSocket access, and includes a change-history entry dated 2026-06-02. Duplicate GOPAX discovery rows are consolidated into one entity.

evidence.title: GOPAX official exchange
evidence.notes: Current first-party GOPAX exchange endpoint is reachable and identifies the service as a Korean virtual-asset exchange.

evidence.title: GOPAX REST API
evidence.notes: Official GOPAX REST API documentation covers KRW trading pairs, balances, order queries, market and limit order placement, cancellation, trade history, deposits and withdrawals, tickers, order books, market statistics, charts, notices, WebSocket access, and a change history extending to 2026-06-02.

evidence.title: GOPAX API Documentation repository
evidence.notes: Official GOPAX GitHub organization repository points users to the GOPAX API documentation and provides first-party ownership linkage for the documented trading API.
